description: A playlistItem resource identifies another resource, such as a video, that is included in a playlist.
name: PlaylistItem

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#playlistItem.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the playlist item.

snippet.description: Basic details about the playlist item such as its title and position in the playlist.

publishedAt.description: The date and time that the item was added to the playlist.

channelId.description: The ID of the user that added the video to the playlist.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the playlist item.

channelTitle.description: The channel title of the channel that the playlist item belongs to.

playlistId.description: The ID of the playlist that the playlist item is in.

position.description: The order in which the item appears in the playlist.

resourceId.description: The id object contains information that can be used to uniquely identify the resource that is included in the playlist as the playlist item.

kind.description: The kind, or type, of the referred resource.

videoId.description: If the snippet.resourceId.kind property has a value of youtube#video, this property is present.

contentDetails.description: The contentDetails object is included in the resource if the included item is a YouTube video.

videoId.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify a video.

videoPublishedAt.description: The date and time that the video was published to YouTube.

status.description: The status object contains information about the playlist item's privacy status.
